calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-06-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-06-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye #3538
Mercedes Gavin, Esq. for Plaintiff: The John Stewart Company.
Plaintiff's witness: Reginald Hairston, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Robert Warren.
Exhibit 1 - Three-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Leasing Agreement------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1311 D Gateview Ave., San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $5,700.98
Attorney's Fees $500.00
Costs $231.30, for a TOTAL of $6,432.28
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court
Judgment signed in open court.
